questionHtml:
Starting at A, use Prim’s algorithm to find and draw the minimum spanning tree for G.

Your solution should indicate clearly the way in which the tree is constructed.

meta.title: Starting at A, use Prim’s algorithm to find and draw the minimum spanning tree for G. Your solution should indicate clearly the way in which the tree is constructed.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 3.16—Tree and cycle algorithms, Chinese postman, travelling salesman
